MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Plaintiff GURU SHARANAM, LLC is present. Represented by
Attorney MICHAEL HEATH, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant ANNE MARIE YANTES, is present.
Attorney HOPE L. GREENHILL, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem BARBARA ANSCHER, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B , for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle.

The trial date of MAY 9, 2011 remains on calendar.
